user_message: Port {port} is already in use. Use the port-holder action to find and stop the process.

fingerprint: Cannot connect to the Docker daemon at unix:///var/run/docker\.sock
user_message: Docker Desktop is not running. Start Docker Desktop, wait for the whale icon to be steady, then retry.

fingerprint: Cannot connect to the Docker daemon.*Is the docker daemon running
user_message: The Docker daemon is not running. Start it with `sudo systemctl start docker`.

fingerprint: (WSL is not installed|wsl\.exe.*not recognized|The Windows Subsystem for Linux is not installed)
user_message: WSL2 is required on Windows. Install it with `wsl --install` from an Administrator PowerShell, then reboot.
WSL is installed but no Linux distribution is set up. Install Ubuntu with `wsl --install -d Ubuntu-24.04`.

fingerprint: (python3: command not found|/bin/sh: python3: not found)
user_message: python3 is not installed inside the WSL distro. Run `sudo apt-get install -y python3 python3-pip` inside WSL, then retry.

fingerprint: toomanyrequests: You have reached your pull rate limit
user_message: Docker Hub pull rate limit hit. Sign in to Docker Hub with `docker login` (free tier allows 200 pulls per 6 hours).
Disk is full. Free space with `docker system prune -af` or remove unused volumes with `docker volume prune`.

fingerprint: permission denied while trying to connect to the Docker daemon socket
user_message: Your user is not in the `docker` group. Run `sudo usermod -aG docker $USER`, then log out and back in.

fingerprint: (backend/\.env.*No such file or directory|cp: cannot stat 'backend/\.env)
user_message: backend/.env is missing. Run `cp backend/.env.example backend/.env`, edit any required values, then retry.
Only Docker Compose v1 was found. Parthenon requires Docker Compose v2 (`docker compose ...`). Update Docker to a recent version.
Docker is not installed. Install Docker Desktop (mac/Windows) or Docker Engine (Linux) and retry.

fingerprint: (unauthorized: authentication required|denied: requested access to the resource is denied)
user_message: An image is private and you are not authenticated. Run `docker login` (or `docker login ghcr.io`) and retry.
An image referenced by docker-compose was not found. Confirm your network is up and the image tag is correct.
DNS resolution failed. Confirm internet connectivity and that no corporate VPN/proxy is required.
TLS certificate problem reaching a registry. If you're behind a corporate proxy, set HTTPS_PROXY or import the proxy CA into your trust store.

fingerprint: Bind for 0\.0\.0\.0:(\d+) failed: port is already allocated
user_message: Port {port} is already mapped by another container. Stop the conflicting container or change the host port.
A service was killed for lack of memory. Increase Docker Desktop memory to at least 6 GB (Preferences → Resources).
PostgreSQL rejected the configured password. Reset the database with `docker compose down -v` (deletes data) or fix the DB_PASSWORD value in backend/.env.

fingerprint: (could not connect to server.*Connection refused|the database system is starting up)
user_message: PostgreSQL is starting up. The installer will wait — if this persists past 60 s, check `docker compose logs postgres`.

fingerprint: Could not connect to Redis at .*: Connection refused
user_message: Redis is not reachable. Check `docker compose logs redis` and confirm REDIS_PASSWORD is set in backend/.env.
Solr ran out of heap. Edit SOLR_HEAP in backend/.env to a larger value (default 512 m → try 1 g) and `docker compose up -d --force-recreate solr`.

fingerprint: (JavaScript heap out of memory|FATAL ERROR.*Reached heap limit)
user_message: Vite ran out of Node heap. Set NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 and rerun the install.

fingerprint: (Could not authenticate against|Failed to download.*from packagist)
user_message: Composer (PHP) cannot reach Packagist. Check internet/proxy settings; if behind a proxy, set HTTPS_PROXY before running the installer.
npm hit a permissions error. Close any IDE that has the project open, or run from a non-OneDrive folder.
macOS is blocking a quarantined binary. Right-click → Open the .app once, or run `xattr -dr com.apple.quarantine <path>`.
SELinux denied a Docker volume mount. Add `:Z` to the volume in docker-compose.community.yml or set SELinux to permissive temporarily for testing.
Your WSL distro is on WSL 1. Upgrade with `wsl --set-version <distro> 2` and re-run the installer.

fingerprint: (WSL distro does not have Docker integration|cannot connect to WSL.*docker)
user_message: Docker Desktop's WSL integration is disabled for your distro. Open Docker Desktop → Settings → Resources → WSL integration, enable your distro, click Apply & Restart.
git is not installed. Install git and retry.

fingerprint: Could not install packages due to an OSError.*Permission denied
user_message: pip cannot write to its install location. On Linux, prefix with sudo OR use a venv. On macOS/Windows in WSL, prefer `pip install --user`.
OHDSI Achilles characterization failed for one source. The install can continue; re-run later via Admin → System Health → Achilles.

fingerprint: (Athena vocabulary ZIP.*not found|vocab\.zip: No such file)
user_message: The Athena vocabulary ZIP path is invalid. Re-download from https://athena.ohdsi.org and update the path in Configure.
Hecate concept-search bootstrap assets are missing. Use the 'Download Hecate bootstrap' button in preflight, or skip Hecate by unchecking it in Configure.
docker-compose.yml has a syntax error. Run `docker compose config` to see the parser's complaint.
Docker Desktop on macOS/Windows does not support `network_mode: host`. The installer's compose file should not use it.
Port 3000 is busy. The installer can use a different port — re-run with `VITE_PORT=3001` exported.
Port 5432 is busy. Stop the local PostgreSQL service holding it, or set DB_PORT to another port in backend/.env.
Ollama (AI features) is not reachable on port 11434. Either install Ollama and `ollama serve`, or unset OLLAMA_URL in backend/.env to disable AI features.
curl is not installed in your WSL distro. Run `sudo apt-get install -y curl` inside WSL, then retry.
tar is not installed in your WSL distro. Run `sudo apt-get install -y tar` inside WSL, then retry.
Node.js version is too old. Install Node 20 or newer (via nvm or nodejs.org) and retry.

fingerprint: Cannot connect to the Docker daemon at tcp://
user_message: docker is configured to talk to a remote daemon. Run `docker context use default` and retry.
An x86-64 binary cannot run on Apple Silicon. Confirm you downloaded the universal/arm64 .dmg, or install Rosetta with `softwareupdate --install-rosetta`.
.AppImage needs FUSE. On Ubuntu 22.04+: `sudo apt-get install -y libfuse2`.
The RPM is signed but its public key is not in your keyring. Import SIGNING-KEY.asc and retry.
The .deb signature did not verify. Do not install — re-download and verify against SHA256SUMS.txt.
The frontend build was not produced. Re-run with the community runtime profile, or run `./deploy.sh --frontend` manually.
The installer was cancelled by the user. State is preserved — Resume picks up from the last completed step.
/tmp is not writable. Confirm disk isn't full and that /tmp is mounted with default permissions.
